hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.swift) command -v swiftformat >/dev/null 2>&1 && swiftformat "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.swift) command -v swiftlint >/dev/null 2>&1 && swiftlint lint --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -10 ;; esac; exit 0
